name: Welcome To Section E
overview: What happens when a girl joins a class full of rowdy boys? It's the notorious section E versus the fierce new girl. All Jay-jay wants is an uneventful and trouble-free new life at her new school, but Section E's grumpy president, Keifer, has other plans.

name: Special Order
overview: The troublesome section's crazy antics gets crazier after finding out Jay-jay's family background. And Section E's former president comes back to reclaim his position, and possibly get Jay-jay's attention too, but Keifer does not back down.

name: Band-Aid
overview: Does absence really make the heart grow fonder? Days after the PE incident, Keifer tries to make up for what he did to Jay-jay with the help of Section E. But is it a genuine apology or is it still part of his plan?

name: After The Rain
overview: Keifer involves the whole section E in his plan to make Jay-jay fall for him. Amidst Keifer's grand plan, Jay-jay spends a rainy day with the aloof Yuri and gets to know him. Will Yuri still be up for the plan after getting close to Jay-jay?

name: Love Letters
overview: Jay-jay finds herself caught in trouble again after helping Mica, Calix's ex-girlfriend. In need of closure or perhaps a second chance, Calix and Mica finally discuss their ugly past, while Jay-jay and Keifer are on guard, not as meddlers... but possibly matchmakers?

name: Frame-Up
overview: Keifer continuously annoys Jay-jay, who still has mixed feelings about their accidental kiss. The tension grows as Keifer starts to have conflicting feelings about his plan against Jay-jay. Meanwhile, Ci-N gets into trouble, and the whole section E comes to his defense.

name: Superhero
overview: Jay-jay and Section E become Superman's unexpected heroes as they help him with his family's struggling business. And as they serve food and good looks, Keifer and Yuri go on a silent battle to impress Jay-jay.

name: The Suitor
overview: Keifer and Jay-jay's bond deepens but Kiko enters the picture. However, an even greater threat than Kiko is about to disrupt their budding romance.

name: Positive
overview: Section E goes to the amusement park. Amidst the fun and chaos, Jay-jay confirms that Keifer cares for her. Or is it still part of the plan? Meanwhile, an unplanned revelation about Denzel surprises Section E.

name: The Rescue
overview: Ram abducts Jay-jay to exact revenge. Section E, led by Keifer, comes to her rescue. Amidst the chaos, Jay-jay's childhood trauma resurfaces, and Keifer witnesses her misery. Can Keifer rescue Jay-jay from her nightmares?

name: The Festival
overview: Section E finally joins the festival and shows everyone how talented they are. Amidst the competition on stage, a more intense battle is happening. It's Keifer versus Yuri. Whose performance will capture Jay-jay's heart?

name: The Aftermath
overview: Jay-jay learns about Kiko's evil plan and how Section E, led by Keifer, came to her rescue. Sem break approaches and Jay-jay finds herself confronting a scary feeling during a Halloween party.

name: Fight for Her
overview: Keifer's actions confuse Jay-jay more. Amidst their push and pull, Jay-jay gets involved in Drew's mix-up with a notorious gang leader. To settle Drew's debts, Yuri steps in to fight and prove to Jay-jay that his love for her overcomes his past trauma.

name: Profanity
overview: Jay-jay finds herself absent-mindedly agreeing to a silly deal made by Keifer. A kiss for every profanity. Meanwhile, Yuri makes a bold move to prove to Jay-jay that he is the right choice.

name: The Choice
overview: Tita Gemma tells Jay-jay that the one who gave her the ring truly loves her, but Aries demands she return it. During Section E’s Christmas party, fun turns to shock when an unexpected love confession stuns everyone. Will this lead to happiness or another heartbreak?

name: The Engagement
overview: Jay-jay gets the shock of her life when a simple New Year's celebration turns out to be her engagement party. Keifer shows up, confusing Jay-jay more. Will she choose to help her family, or will she listen to her heart?

name: Welcome Back to Section E
overview: We finally see what happened after New Year’s Eve. Back at school, Jay-jay is torn between confessing to Yuri or holding on to her feelings for Keifer. Their rivalry intensifies when a near-death incident occurs, sending both rushing to save her, but who gets to her first?

name: Self-Defense 101
overview: The boys, led by Keifer and Yuri, teach Jay-jay self-defense. Prepared for physical fights, Jay-jay finds herself struggling to win her heart's battles. Will she follow her heart or honor her responsibility?

name: The Answer
overview: Jay-Jay digs deeper to find out the truth about her father, all while the competition between Keifer and Yuri intensifies. As Keifer stakes his claim, Yuri stands his ground. Jay-Jay, caught in between, finally gives her answer.

name: Meeting The Father
overview: A dinner invitation brings all of Section E to the Watson mansion. Meeting the father of the one you love should be exciting but what if the night uncovers wounds better left hidden? Some introductions don’t end in smiles, they leave scars.

name: The Dinner
overview: Jay-jay plans to come clean with Yuri about Keifer, but his unexpected reaction catches her off guard. Just when she’s certain of her feelings, a shocking presence at the dinner bursts her bubble, with Keifer at the center. Is this confusion… or part of a petty little game?

name: The Retreat
overview: It’s retreat day. As Jay-Jay wonders why the Section E Boys are fighting, a supposed getaway turns dark. Haunted by someone and by secrets from the past, she faces two shocking revelations. Can she survive what unfolds?

name: Lost In The Woods
overview: The fun continues into the HVIS retreat, where laughter awakens Jay-jay’s alter ego, “Barracuda,” terrifying the boys of Section E. With fear mixing into the laughter, one question lingers will this retreat end in memories… or regrets?

name: Brother
overview: We journey into Jay-jay and the boys’ past, where innocence was shattered and lives were lost. As the truth behind their anger surfaces, one question remains, can the past ever be understood enough to be forgiven?

name: The Plan
overview: Barely recovering from the truth about her cousin, Jay-jay faces a new revelation that cuts even deeper. Betrayed by those she loves and trusts most, she’s pushed to a breaking point, one that may change her forever.
